channel.title: If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die
channel.description: An AI-narrated audiobook adaptation of the hit Korean web novel. A Korean man wakes up trapped inside a BL romance fantasy novel — as a background extra destined to die. To survive, he must make sure the main characters fall in love. New episodes daily. Perfect for fans of isekai, manhwa, BL romance, and Korean web novels.
channel.itunes:author: WebNovel AI Studio

image.title: If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die

channel.itunes:subtitle: Survive the story. Don't become the main character.
channel.itunes:keywords: korean web novel, BL romance, isekai, manhwa, audiobook, fantasy, romance, light novel, webnovel, AI audiobook, Korean fiction, BL fantasy, otome isekai

item.title: Episode 24 The scenario weight has changed
item.description: In Episode 24, the stakes just escalated as our protagonist discovers their scenario weight inexplicably increased by an entire percentage point. With no apparent changes in the game or recent events, they find themselves thrust into a mysterious plot twist that threatens more than just their character's fate—now, it’s survival itself. Can they trust anyone in this shifting world?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 24, the stakes just escalated as our protagonist discovers their scenario weight inexplicably increased by an entire percentage point. With no apparent changes in the game or recent events, they find themselves thrust into a mysterious plot twist that threatens more than just their character's fate—now, it’s survival itself. Can they trust anyone in this shifting world?

item.title: Episode 23 The predator's quiet victory begins
item.description: In the dead of night, a shadow moves through the city's alleys, carrying with it the weight of a life that may soon slip away. As Leovald cradles his exhausted companion, he finds himself drawn deeper into a labyrinth of secrets and schemes—each step bringing him closer to either survival or oblivion. Can he uncover the true nature of their journey before it's too late?
item.itunes:summary: In the dead of night, a shadow moves through the city's alleys, carrying with it the weight of a life that may soon slip away. As Leovald cradles his exhausted companion, he finds himself drawn deeper into a labyrinth of secrets and schemes—each step bringing him closer to either survival or oblivion. Can he uncover the true nature of their journey before it's too late?

item.title: Episode 22 The plan needs a mysterious third party
item.description: In Episode 22, our protagonist forces a reluctant ally to orchestrate a daring heist from behind the scenes, using a mysterious third party to pull off the impossible. As the plan unfolds, tensions rise and trust fractures—leaving Lopez with a choice: follow orders or face certain death. The stakes are high, and one wrong move could unravel everything.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 22, our protagonist forces a reluctant ally to orchestrate a daring heist from behind the scenes, using a mysterious third party to pull off the impossible. As the plan unfolds, tensions rise and trust fractures—leaving Lopez with a choice: follow orders or face certain death. The stakes are high, and one wrong move could unravel everything.

item.title: Episode 21 The art of gentle psychological torture
item.description: In Episode 21, tensions reach boiling point as Leonardo's gentle psychological torture takes a sinister turn. When his usual kindness toward Vittorio and the narrator turns into cold manipulation, they must question their trust in him—especially when he hints at their impending doom. Can they navigate this treacherous roleplay without becoming its tragic victims?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 21, tensions reach boiling point as Leonardo's gentle psychological torture takes a sinister turn. When his usual kindness toward Vittorio and the narrator turns into cold manipulation, they must question their trust in him—especially when he hints at their impending doom. Can they navigate this treacherous roleplay without becoming its tragic victims?

item.title: Episode 20 Entering Roald's manor under cover of night
item.description: In the dead of night, two intruders scale Baron Roald’s ethereal manor wall, evading a drunken guard whose loyalty is questionable at best. As they slip into the mansion’s shadows, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on their ability to navigate the manor undetected while avoiding not just the baron’s enemies but also his own unpredictable hospitality.
item.itunes:summary: In the dead of night, two intruders scale Baron Roald’s ethereal manor wall, evading a drunken guard whose loyalty is questionable at best. As they slip into the mansion’s shadows, the stakes are higher than ever—survival hinges on their ability to navigate the manor undetected while avoiding not just the baron’s enemies but also his own unpredictable hospitality.

item.title: Episode 19 Searching in the Dark
item.description: In Episode 19: "Searching in the Dark," Leonardo finds himself trapped in Baron Roald’s shadowed manor, his every move watched by unseen forces. As he searches Viscount Lopez's room, dark secrets from the Count of Bermont’s past emerge, threatening to unravel a sinister plot. Can Leonardo uncover the truth before the shadows claim him—or will he become just another forgotten corpse?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 19: "Searching in the Dark," Leonardo finds himself trapped in Baron Roald’s shadowed manor, his every move watched by unseen forces. As he searches Viscount Lopez's room, dark secrets from the Count of Bermont’s past emerge, threatening to unravel a sinister plot. Can Leonardo uncover the truth before the shadows claim him—or will he become just another forgotten corpse?

item.title: Episode 18 The system's hidden rules revealed
item.description: In Episode 18, the stakes are higher than ever as Leovald must navigate a dangerous scenario where his body is targeted by the villainous Viscount Lopez. With each passing moment, he inches closer to becoming the main character—or facing certain death. Can he uncover the hidden rules of this deadly game and survive long enough to understand the true nature of this world?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 18, the stakes are higher than ever as Leovald must navigate a dangerous scenario where his body is targeted by the villainous Viscount Lopez. With each passing moment, he inches closer to becoming the main character—or facing certain death. Can he uncover the hidden rules of this deadly game and survive long enough to understand the true nature of this world?

item.title: Episode 17 The deep tunnels and unexpected help
item.description: In Episode 17, you find yourself navigating pitch-black tunnels with barely enough air to breathe, where every step could be your last. When Leonardo catches you mid-fall, his quick reflexes become your only lifeline in this underground labyrinth. As the stakes rise and the map reveals just how far you’ve yet to go, you can't help but wonder—will you find the way out or become lost forever?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 17, you find yourself navigating pitch-black tunnels with barely enough air to breathe, where every step could be your last. When Leonardo catches you mid-fall, his quick reflexes become your only lifeline in this underground labyrinth. As the stakes rise and the map reveals just how far you’ve yet to go, you can't help but wonder—will you find the way out or become lost forever?

item.title: Episode 16
item.description: In Episode 16, the stakes rise as our protagonist is thrust deeper into a dangerous game where every move could mean life or death. With shadows lurking and cryptic letters appearing in the dark, they must navigate through treacherous tunnels while hiding their true identity from a seemingly harmless guide. Can they trust anyone—or will the darkness consume them entirely?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 16, the stakes rise as our protagonist is thrust deeper into a dangerous game where every move could mean life or death. With shadows lurking and cryptic letters appearing in the dark, they must navigate through treacherous tunnels while hiding their true identity from a seemingly harmless guide. Can they trust anyone—or will the darkness consume them entirely?

item.title: Episode 15 The futility of searching for answers
item.description: In Episode 15, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinth of unanswered questions. As they search for clues about mysterious "cloak-wearing figures," the stakes rise when Leonardo's physical limitations threaten to derail their mission. With every dead-end and unanswered query, the tension builds—will they uncover the truth, or will the futility of their quest lead to disaster?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 15, our protagonist finds themselves trapped in a labyrinth of unanswered questions. As they search for clues about mysterious "cloak-wearing figures," the stakes rise when Leonardo's physical limitations threaten to derail their mission. With every dead-end and unanswered query, the tension builds—will they uncover the truth, or will the futility of their quest lead to disaster?

item.title: Episode 14 The missing dog mystery begins now
item.description: In Episode 14, Leonardo is thrust into a high-stakes mystery when a ship's captain begs for help finding his missing mascot cat, Roboy. With time ticking and a fierce storm brewing on the horizon, every corner of the harbor holds secrets—some sinister—and the fate of both the cat and the ship hangs in the balance. Can Leonardo solve the puzzle before it’s too late?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 14, Leonardo is thrust into a high-stakes mystery when a ship's captain begs for help finding his missing mascot cat, Roboy. With time ticking and a fierce storm brewing on the horizon, every corner of the harbor holds secrets—some sinister—and the fate of both the cat and the ship hangs in the balance. Can Leonardo solve the puzzle before it’s too late?

item.title: Episode 13 Leonardo arrives with a mystery
item.description: In Episode 13, the stakes are higher than ever as Leonardo bursts into your room early morning, carrying secrets that could either save or doom you. With clues stacking up and a mysterious visitor who knows more than he's letting on, you must decide: will you embrace your fate as the main character, or risk becoming one of the many left behind?
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 13, the stakes are higher than ever as Leonardo bursts into your room early morning, carrying secrets that could either save or doom you. With clues stacking up and a mysterious visitor who knows more than he's letting on, you must decide: will you embrace your fate as the main character, or risk becoming one of the many left behind?

item.title: Episode 12 The truth behind the ranking system
item.description: In a world where your rank determines your survival, a mysterious innkeeper reveals shocking truths about the ranking system. As tension mounts and alliances shift, one misstep could spell death—literally. Can you trust the charming yet suspicious innkeeper who seems to know more than she lets on?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where your rank determines your survival, a mysterious innkeeper reveals shocking truths about the ranking system. As tension mounts and alliances shift, one misstep could spell death—literally. Can you trust the charming yet suspicious innkeeper who seems to know more than she lets on?

item.title: Episode 11 Chicken chasing reveals my weakness
item.description: In a world where survival hinges on your ability to become the main character, you'd think catching chickens would be child’s play. But when our hero realizes her stamina is non-existent by chicken standards, she faces a harsh reality: either master this bizarre skill or risk starvation in a future world. With Leonardo's effortless prowess drawing crowds and whispers of admiration, can she ever hope to catch up—or will her poor fitness cost her life?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where survival hinges on your ability to become the main character, you'd think catching chickens would be child’s play. But when our hero realizes her stamina is non-existent by chicken standards, she faces a harsh reality: either master this bizarre skill or risk starvation in a future world. With Leonardo's effortless prowess drawing crowds and whispers of admiration, can she ever hope to catch up—or will her poor fitness cost her life?

item.title: Episode 10 Sub-Quest
item.description: In the bustling streets of Sinistra, Leonardo finds himself thrust into a chaotic sub-quest where his quick thinking and nimble hands are put to the test. As he catches chickens and solves petty disputes, his reputation grows, drawing unwanted attention from powerful figures like Baron Roald. But as Leonardo's fame spreads, so does the risk—could solving these small problems lead to an even larger, more dangerous challenge that threatens everything he holds dear?
item.itunes:summary: In the bustling streets of Sinistra, Leonardo finds himself thrust into a chaotic sub-quest where his quick thinking and nimble hands are put to the test. As he catches chickens and solves petty disputes, his reputation grows, drawing unwanted attention from powerful figures like Baron Roald. But as Leonardo's fame spreads, so does the risk—could solving these small problems lead to an even larger, more dangerous challenge that threatens everything he holds dear?

item.title: Episode 9 The unexpected arrival changes everything
item.description: In Episode 9 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," Vittorio's sudden declaration to return to an uncertain fate sets off a chain of events that threaten the very balance of the story. As mysterious children from his past reappear, the line between safety and danger blurs, leaving Leonardo and his companions caught in a web of intrigue where every decision could be their last.
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 9 of "If You Don't Become the Main Character, You'll Die," Vittorio's sudden declaration to return to an uncertain fate sets off a chain of events that threaten the very balance of the story. As mysterious children from his past reappear, the line between safety and danger blurs, leaving Leonardo and his companions caught in a web of intrigue where every decision could be their last.

item.title: Episode 8 A necklace and some dangerous secrets
item.description: In the shadowy alleys of a forgotten town, you stumble upon secrets that could either make or break your life. A simple purchase at a market stall unravels a web of noble deceit and hidden loyalties, where every word spoken might be a trap—or your only chance to survive. Are you brave enough to uncover the truth behind Lord Lopez’s sudden interest in an ancient moonstone necklace?
item.itunes:summary: In the shadowy alleys of a forgotten town, you stumble upon secrets that could either make or break your life. A simple purchase at a market stall unravels a web of noble deceit and hidden loyalties, where every word spoken might be a trap—or your only chance to survive. Are you brave enough to uncover the truth behind Lord Lopez’s sudden interest in an ancient moonstone necklace?

item.title: Episode 7
item.description: In a world where every detail could be a clue to survival, a young investigator uncovers a web of subtle signs leading to an impending visit by a powerful noble. But as she pieces together the fragments—cheap cuts of meat, unusual purchases from servants—the stakes grow higher with each revelation. Can she decipher the cryptic signals before it's too late, or will she become just another casualty in this game of hidden agendas?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where every detail could be a clue to survival, a young investigator uncovers a web of subtle signs leading to an impending visit by a powerful noble. But as she pieces together the fragments—cheap cuts of meat, unusual purchases from servants—the stakes grow higher with each revelation. Can she decipher the cryptic signals before it's too late, or will she become just another casualty in this game of hidden agendas?

item.title: Episode 6 A meal breaks down suspicion's walls
item.description: In a grim alleyway, food becomes the unexpected key to breaking through years of suspicion and distrust. As strangers gather around a basket of sustenance, one traveler offers a deal that could either save or doom them all—revealing secrets that threaten their very survival in this harsh world. Can they trust the innkeeper’s seemingly innocent proposition?
item.itunes:summary: In a grim alleyway, food becomes the unexpected key to breaking through years of suspicion and distrust. As strangers gather around a basket of sustenance, one traveler offers a deal that could either save or doom them all—revealing secrets that threaten their very survival in this harsh world. Can they trust the innkeeper’s seemingly innocent proposition?

item.title: Episode 5 The Afterlife of the Good Person
item.description: In a world where you can only become the main character by changing your actions, one man finds himself trapped in an endless cycle of repetition—where every coin he collects seems to be a lifeline and a curse. As dawn breaks and he returns to the inn with a pouch heavier than his worries, Leonardo must decide: is it worth risking everything to finally claim his narrative destiny—or will he be forever stuck as a mere observer?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where you can only become the main character by changing your actions, one man finds himself trapped in an endless cycle of repetition—where every coin he collects seems to be a lifeline and a curse. As dawn breaks and he returns to the inn with a pouch heavier than his worries, Leonardo must decide: is it worth risking everything to finally claim his narrative destiny—or will he be forever stuck as a mere observer?

item.title: Episode 4 Whispers and toasts to a fallen hero
item.description: In the shadow of a tragic hero's death, whispers of conspiracy and betrayal swirl through the halls of power. As mourners toast to a fallen legend, one patron's hidden agenda threatens to unravel the very fabric of the kingdom—a tale where loyalty is tested, and only the true main character can survive.
item.itunes:summary: In the shadow of a tragic hero's death, whispers of conspiracy and betrayal swirl through the halls of power. As mourners toast to a fallen legend, one patron's hidden agenda threatens to unravel the very fabric of the kingdom—a tale where loyalty is tested, and only the true main character can survive.

item.title: Episode 3 The Inn Becomes an Information Guild
item.description:
You’re not just an innkeeper anymore—you’re a master manipulator, weaving through secrets like a shadow. As your "Innkeeper’s Insight" ability reveals hidden truths, you must decide: play the supporting role or become the star? One wrong move could mean death in this world where every character has a secret agenda.
The inn is no longer just a gathering place—it's a labyrinth of power and intrigue. With information at your fingertips, you’re poised to rewrite your fate. But as alliances shift and enemies emerge, can you navigate the treacherous waters without becoming collateral damage?
item.itunes:summary:
You’re not just an innkeeper anymore—you’re a master manipulator, weaving through secrets like a shadow. As your "Innkeeper’s Insight" ability reveals hidden truths, you must decide: play the supporting role or become the star? One wrong move could mean death in this world where every character has a secret agenda.
The inn is no longer just a gathering place—it's a labyrinth of power and intrigue. With information at your fingertips, you’re poised to rewrite your fate. But as alliances shift and enemies emerge, can you navigate the treacherous waters without becoming collateral damage?

item.title: Episode 2 Securing My Home, Success
item.description: In a world where your "scenario importance" determines your very existence, one misstep could mean eternal erasure—worse than death itself. When Leonardo, lost in a drunken stupor, finds himself face-to-face with his own demise, the stakes are higher than he ever imagined. Can he reclaim his true identity before it's too late, or will he vanish into nothingness forever?
item.itunes:summary: In a world where your "scenario importance" determines your very existence, one misstep could mean eternal erasure—worse than death itself. When Leonardo, lost in a drunken stupor, finds himself face-to-face with his own demise, the stakes are higher than he ever imagined. Can he reclaim his true identity before it's too late, or will he vanish into nothingness forever?

item.title: Episode 1 The First Scene of the Stage
item.description: You’ve just died, and now you're thrust into a world where life is nothing more than a meticulously scripted play. As an insignificant extra with no lines, the only way to survive is to somehow become the star of the show—or risk being erased from existence entirely. Can you find your purpose in this cosmic stage, or will you fade into obscurity forever?
item.itunes:summary: You’ve just died, and now you're thrust into a world where life is nothing more than a meticulously scripted play. As an insignificant extra with no lines, the only way to survive is to somehow become the star of the show—or risk being erased from existence entirely. Can you find your purpose in this cosmic stage, or will you fade into obscurity forever?
